maxed-out-leveling-yp.title: Maxed Out Leveling
maxed-out-leveling-yp.synopsis: Max-level internal arts, max-level external arts. Jianghu, Murim's famous and strongest, Cha Shin Hyeon. I came back to Earth after reaching the peak of martial arts, but why has everything changed so much? A world where monsters are coming out of dungeons, and hunters are leveling up via their status windows. ‘Start again from level one? That doesn't phase me at all, since my martial arts are already at the max level.'

reincarnated-into-demon-king-evelogias-w.title: Reincarnated into Demon King Evelogia's World
reincarnated-into-demon-king-evelogias-w.synopsis: Reincarnated into Demon King Evelogia's World summary is updating. Come visit vymanga.net sometime to read the latest chapter of Reincarnated into Demon King Evelogia's World. Hope you enjoy it.

seashell-boy-xg.title: Seashell boy
seashell-boy-xg.synopsis: Dooshik is in a bind. After making off with the takings from the gay bar where he worked, he seeks refuge in a small, coastal town. As his funds dwindle, he desperately needs a way to make ends meet. Still, a boy's gotta eat! So he dives into a clam house to satisfy his cravings. But with no money to pay, he dashes off leaving Jooha, the server, to foot the bill. Later on, when Dooshik returns to pay his debt, he's greeted by a sordid scene that offers a tantalizing glimpse of the solution to his money problems. For within Jooha's beautiful shell lies a secret treasure waiting to be drawn out. And Dooshik is just the man to do it.Pearl Boy,

surviving-in-an-action-manhwa.title: Surviving in an Action Manhwa
surviving-in-an-action-manhwa.synopsis: [Mission: Occupy the space, secure your part, and survive until the end.] After a disagreement with the author, Lee Hee-ro transmigrated to the world of his favourite shounen manga, Adventure King! But what’s this, characters have to work hard for their survival? If you’re a two-bit villain, you get defeated by the protagonist from the get-go? If you’re the strongest on the current map, you get hammered down by a newcomer to show off their strength? If you aren’t popular with the fanbase, your character gets deleted?! In a world of endless fights, a crazy sprint to survive just the next chapter begins!

levelup-doctor-manhwa.title: Level-Up Doctor (Manhwa)
levelup-doctor-manhwa.synopsis: Level-Up Doctor (Manhwa) summary is updating. Come visit vymanga.net sometime to read the latest chapter of Level-Up Doctor (Manhwa). Hope you enjoy it.

fulltime-awakening.title: Full-Time Awakening
fulltime-awakening.synopsis:
As the captain of the Divine Legion and the strongest Awakener, Bai Yi is betrayed by a comrade, witnessing all his teammates die before his eyes. Only then does he realize he has always been a pawn of those in power. Having lost everything, he is reborn 20 years ago, back to his middle school days before awakening.

At that time, his family and teammates are still alive. To save them, to avenge the betrayer, and to overthrow the entire corrupt ruling system, he embarks on a lonely path of strength.

under-the-greenlight-in-dreams.title: Under the Green Light : In Dreams 〘Official〙
under-the-greenlight-in-dreams.synopsis:
Description :
"Jin is the most perfectly beautiful man Matthew’s ever seen. He’s also a high-ranking and violent criminal full of frustrated ambitions and equally frustrated appetites. But Matthew, a sculpture student prodigy, can only see the beauty—not the darkness. One way or another, Matthew will pay the price for his muse, with his body... or with something far more costly."

the-royal-bridegroom.title: The Royal Bridegroom
the-royal-bridegroom.synopsis: “Anyone who touches this person will have to risk their neck.” The king's son-in-law who lost his wife before the wedding. Due to the national law, he must remain as the royal bridegroom who can only live as a widower for life, while his two brothers-in-law become rivals in love over him.

greatest-boss-system.title: Greatest Boss System
greatest-boss-system.synopsis: Description :Who is he? Why is he called the Boss? Maybe he's the fearless ruler of the world. Or maybe the worst enemy of humanity, who tears worlds down. After Su Sin was reborn, he lost all his skills and abilities from former life in a knights' world. However, a newly implanted System can help him restore them. "My name is Su Sin where Sin means Promise keeper".

papa-to-watashi-to-ayumuchan.title: Papa to watashi to Ayumu-chan
papa-to-watashi-to-ayumuchan.synopsis: Even if its not fate, I want to be with you. Ayumu is a worker at a real estate agent and he's currently worrying about his lack of pheremones and its effect on others. Suddenly one day, he encountered a super beautiful alpha called Ren who works in the red light district. When Ayumu learns that Ren is living dangerously on the streets with his cute daughter Rui, he decides to help them. When Ayumu sees Ren at his work he starts to fall for him. The slightly unreliable Ren shows Ayumu his more sexual side and Ayumu grows more attracted. However from that moment, Ayumu's pheremone production started to increase and without him knowing he started to seduce Ren!?

i-became-a-level-999-mastermind-demon-ki.title: I Became A Level 999 Mastermind Demon King
i-became-a-level-999-mastermind-demon-ki.synopsis: I was reincarnated into the otome game, "In This World, With The Power of Love" not as the heroine, but as the Lv. 999 Demon King. I was cast out by my family and sent to the freezing north, but I wonder if I could just melt the snow with my magic? I'm trying to find a way to create a farm here and live a carefree life, but the capture targets keep coming at me one after the other. Umm, I don't really care about you guys, so won't you please disappear already?999,  999
